report.summary: Community growth cycle v7 — FOMC Day 1 cycle: sentiment recovery narrative (F&G 5→15→28, 39-day extreme fear streak ending), ETF 5-day inflow streak ($767M weekly, first of 2026), Strategy Inc. 17K BTC buy, FOMC scenario breakdown (dot plot + Powell's second-to-last meeting), tax countdown 27 days, new content drops (Cross-Chain Interop + DAO Governance guides); social card created (sentiment shift infographic with recovery arc + historical comparisons); newsletter DEGEN CORNER insert drafted for Thu Mar 19; 399 published pages, 2 in queue.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Tue morning): FOMC Day scenario breakdown — 3 outcomes (hawkish $65K / neutral $68-74K / dovish $75K+), dot plot key signal, first meeting with Iran oil shock in projections; CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide

Twitter Thread (Tue, 3 posts): Sentiment shift narrative — F&G recovery from 5 (all-time low) to 28, ETF 5-day inflow streak, $767M weekly, BlackRock $115M single day, Coinbase Premium flipped positive, Strategy 17K BTC buy; historical parallels (COVID +1400%, Luna +158%, FTX +300%); CTAs to /tools/whale-tracker + /tools/fear-greed-timeline
Tweet (Tue/Wed): Tax countdown 27 days — 1099 filing by exchanges, all DeFi events taxable; CTAs to /tools/tax-calculator + /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue): New content drop — Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocols Guide 2026 + DAO Governance & On-Chain Voting Guide 2026; CTAs to both guides
Tweet (Tue evening): Powell's exit narrative — term expires May 23, Warsh incoming, second-to-last FOMC; CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide
Tweet (evergreen): DCA accumulation signal — F&G 28, ETFs flowing, 39 days extreme fear, every prior 30+ day streak preceded rally; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator
Discord/Telegram: FOMC Day 1 briefing — full scenario cheat sheet, what to watch tomorrow (dot plot, GDP/inflation projections, Powell tone on stagflation), tool links

Newsletter insert: DEGEN CORNER for Thu Mar 19 issue — sentiment shift narrative with recovery data, ETF dam breaking, Strategy buy, historical pattern analysis, tool CTAs, content roundup (399 pages)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fomc-day-sentiment-shift-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: Fear & Greed recovery arc (5→15→28 with color-coded data points), historical comparison boxes (COVID +1400%, Luna +158%, FTX +300%), BTC price panel ($72,597 +1.95%), ETF inflows panel ($767M, 5-day streak), Strategy Inc. panel (738,731 BTC, +17K), bottom stats row (FOMC T-24h, 99% hold, 399 pages, 27 days tax, May 23 Powell exit); glass-morphism cards on dark bg with brand gradient accents.

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: 399 published pages in file, 2 in PUBLISH_QUEUE (Cross-Chain Interoperability + DAO Governance).
FOMC guide and Hyperliquid trading guide NOW LIVE (published Day 50) — resolving the git lock blocker from v6.
BTC at $72,597 (+1.95%), recently tested $74K resistance. Range-bound between $65.6K support and $74K ceiling.
Fear & Greed recovering: 5 (Feb 6 all-time low) → 15 (Mar 10) → 28 (Mar 17). 39 consecutive sessions in extreme fear.
ETF 5-day inflow streak — first of 2026. $767M last week. 3 consecutive weeks positive. BlackRock IBIT $115M single day.
Strategy Inc. purchased 17K+ BTC at ~$71K avg, total holdings 738,731 BTC.
FOMC rate decision tomorrow 2pm ET. 99% hold probability. Dot plot is the key signal. Powell's second-to-last meeting (exits May 23).
Iran/oil overhang: Brent $104-105. First FOMC to formally incorporate Iran shock + tariffs into projections.
Tax season 27 days to April 15. Exchanges now file 1099s. High-intent commercial window.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-17-social-drafts-v7.md

sections.title: Key Narratives for This Cycle
items: PRIMARY: Sentiment recovery — the shift from all-time-low fear (5) to improving conditions (28) is the dominant narrative. ETF inflows, institutional buying, and historical pattern data support the thesis.
SECONDARY: FOMC scenario preparation — educate the audience on what to watch (dot plot, not the rate) before the decision drops tomorrow.
TERTIARY: Tax season urgency — 27-day countdown with new 1099 reporting changes. Commercial intent pages should be promoted heavily.
EMERGING: Powell transition — May 23 exit, Warsh incoming. Longer-term narrative to build over coming weeks.
CONTENT: New guides (Cross-Chain Interop + DAO Governance) fill major content gaps in infrastructure and governance education.
